top_signals.title: Donald Trump says US to hit Canada with 50% tariff
top_signals.summary: Washington accuses neighbour of engaging in unfair trade practices in move that could reignite trade war
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The United States produced more crude oil than any other country in 2025
top_signals.summary: The United States remained the world's largest crude oil producer in 2025, according to our International Energy Statistics database, extending a streak that began in 2018 when the United States overtook Russia to become the world's leading producer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: U.S. exports of crude oil and petroleum products reached record in April
top_signals.summary: U.S. petroleum exports reached a record in April as disruptions to international crude oil and refined product flows through the Strait of Hormuz increased global demand for U.S. exports. Exports increased to 13.6 million barrels per day (b/d) in April, 15% more than the previous record set in March.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Benchmark backs Exodus after 25% workforce cut, says stablecoin pivot is being overlooked
top_signals.summary: Late Friday afternoon, Exodus said it expects the restructuring to generate $10 million to $13 million in annualized cost savings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: AI compute stocks bounce as Hut 8, IREN land billions in new contracts
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Lockheed Martin’s Morfius X-Rotor built to fry 50 enemy drones in one flight
top_signals.summary: Lockheed Martin is rolling out the Morfius X-Rotor, a recoverable counter-drone system the company says can kill 50 enemy drones in one flight.

top_signals.title: Burnham’s Thatcherism jibes are just tired socialist talking points
top_signals.summary: Oasis caution against looking back in anger, yet the narrative Manchester’s other favourite son rehearsed in his first speech as Prime Minister was based on hackneyed old grievances, says Alys Denby Here we go again. Britain has gone through as many prime ministers in the last 10 years as it did in the previous 37 [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI, Antigravity hit by sandbox escapes
top_signals.summary: Researchers escaped the sandboxes in Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI and Antigravity by having the AI agent write files that trusted host tools later run. Multiple CVEs, patches, and Google downgrading two Antigravity findings. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The 250-year history of U.S. energy consumption
top_signals.summary: Over the 250-year history of our nation, energy consumption has evolved from wood use in the 18th and 19th centuries to today's use of modern renewable, hydrocarbon, and nuclear technology. In 2025, total energy used in the United States was 96 quadrillion British thermal units (quads), up 2% from 2024, but below 2007's record 99 quads. Petroleum was the most-used energy source last year, followed closely by natural gas. Use of renewable, coal, and nuclear energy each made up about 9% of total energy use.

top_signals.title: Kalshi, Polymarket open interest falls 20% as World Cup frenzy winds down
top_signals.summary: Sports accounted for 80% of both Kalshi and Polymarket's total volumes throughout the weekslong World Cup tournament.
